message:
feat(cli): Implement list and test commands with full options

- bd-1rb: Enhanced list command with --config, --format (table/json/yaml),
  --verbose, project-local discovery (mcp.json, mcp.toml), enabled status
- bd-133: Added test command for server connectivity testing
  - Tests: initialize, list_tools, list_resources, list_prompts
  - Options: --timeout, --verbose, --json output
- Added protocol_version() accessor to Client
- Fixed clippy warnings in schema.rs (collapsible_match)
- Fixed clippy warning in builder.rs (unnecessary_wraps)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
